## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

What should be built or changed?

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Dependencies

Does this depend on any other work or systems?

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, discussions, or documents.
